headline: Stocks Push Higher on US Labor Market Strength and AI Spending

headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Targets Semiconductor Demand, Adding ON and NXPI to Leveraged Singe Stock ETF Lineup
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 02, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of two new 2X single-stock leveraged ETFs, available for trading beginning June 2, 2026.
